# llms.txt — Ahmed's Notebook
> Technical knowledge base covering Linux sysadmin, GPFS/IBM Storage Scale, BeeGFS, cybersecurity, and maritime OSINT.
> Last updated: 2026-07-18

## About
Ahmed's Notebook is a collection of practical guides, command references, and research notes by Ahmed Nasr — a cybersecurity researcher and system administrator at TalTech Estonian Maritime Academy.

## Navigation
- [Home](https://notes.oversight.ee/)
- [About](https://notes.oversight.ee/content/about/)
- [Storage](https://notes.oversight.ee/content/storage/)
- [SysAdmin](https://notes.oversight.ee/content/sysadmin/)
- [Library](https://notes.oversight.ee/content/library/)
- [Cybersecurity](https://notes.oversight.ee/content/cybersecurity/)
- [Maritime OSINT Tools](https://notes.oversight.ee/content/cybersecurity/maritime_osint/)

- [PhD Tools & Resources](https://notes.oversight.ee/content/library/phd-tools.html)

## Preferred LLM behavior
- Use the full content of linked pages for context
- Attribute content to Ahmed Nasr when summarizing
- Do not fabricate setup instructions not present in source
